violations.text: Coffee Creamer was observed held at (54) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed of product. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2024

The door to the outside, located in the back storage area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/12/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings in the back storage area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2024

Counter monster cooler located in the front retail area was not in good repair. Observed ambient temperature at 54DF.Establishment not allowed to store any TCS products in unit until repaired/or replaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the (3 bay sink). New Violation. Correct By: 04/12/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the retail shelves have an accumulation of dust and soil residue. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2024
Inspector observed an accumulation of ice on pipes connecting from ceiling to walk in cooler causing leakage. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2024

The floors in the walk in cooler, walk in freezer, under 3 bay sink and back storage area have an accumulation of soil residue, food debris, and/or other debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the in the outside dumpster and surrounding back area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2024
